{"compiler":{"version":"0.8.33+commit.64118f21"},"language":"Solidity","output":{"abi":[{"inputs":[],"name":"IS_SCRIPT","outputs":[{"internalType":"bool","name":"","type":"bool"}],"stateMutability":"view","type":"function"},{"inputs":[],"name":"run","outputs":[],"stateMutability":"nonpayable","type":"function"}],"devdoc":{"kind":"dev","methods":{},"title":"Deploy \u2014 Deploys (or reuses) sBOB/sPEN and creates a TradeFinanceEscrow Environment variables:   Required:     DEPLOYER_KEY      \u2014 private key of the deployer (exporter in the demo)     EXPORTER_ADDR     \u2014 exporter wallet address     IMPORTER_ADDR     \u2014 importer wallet address   Optional (token reuse \u2014 avoids fresh deployments for each case):     SBOB_ADDR         \u2014 existing sBOB contract; if unset, deploys new one     SPEN_ADDR         \u2014 existing sPEN contract; if unset, deploys new one   Optional (forex rate):     FOREX_RATE_18     \u2014 PEN/BOB rate as uint256 with 18 dec (default: 494800000000000000 = 0.4948)     FOREX_ORACLE      \u2014 oracle contract address (default: address(0), uses FOREX_RATE_18)   Optional (deal parameters):     INVOICE_BOB       \u2014 invoice in BOB wei (default: 500_000e18)     INCOTERMS         \u2014 e.g. \"CIP Callao\" (default: \"CIP Callao\")     PO_NUMBER         \u2014 purchase order ref (default: \"EP-PO-2026-0219\")     VESSEL            \u2014 vessel/B-L description (default: \"TBD at shipment\")","version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{},"version":1}},"settings":{"compilationTarget":{"script/Deploy.s.sol":"Deploy"},"evmVersion":"prague","libraries":{},"metadata":{"bytecodeHash":"ipfs"},"optimizer":{"enabled":true,"runs":200},"remappings":[":@openzeppelin/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/",":erc4626-tests/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/lib/erc4626-tests/",":forge-std/=lib/forge-std/src/",":halmos-cheatcodes/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/lib/halmos-cheatcodes/src/",":openzeppelin-contracts/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/"],"viaIR":true},"sources":{"lib/forge-std/src/Base.sol":{"keccak256":"0x926f1c9907b7dadb56dc920ae80dc473070989ab1f09b63e207ddc2d37110faa","license":"MIT
